1. Look at the existing src/utils/ directory - list all files and read their contents, especially any string-related utilities
2. Look at how test files are co-located with utility modules (check for .test.ts patterns)
3. Look at src/auth/ directory structure and any existing utility patterns
4. Check src/app/(frontend)/dashboard/page.tsx for the `as unknown as` cast pattern mentioned
5. Check src/utils/result.ts for the Result type pattern

Return the full contents of:
- All files in src/utils/
- The dashboard page if found
- Any existing capitalize or string manipulation utilities
","subagent_type":"Explore"}
